notes: Curated top-20 priority pool for each primary emotion button.
Each group contains 20 unique lines split into three preferred surfaces: home, prelude, export.
Home = shortest and easiest to identify with at first glance.
Prelude = softer ritual-transition lines with movement or regulation feel.

top20_ranked.text: Your worth is not this month's numbers.
You are allowed to breathe before you budget.
You are allowed to be gentle with yourself around money.
Money fear gets louder when your whole future lands on tonight.
One clear money move can take some power back from the panic.
Relief around money can start with one honest number.
You are allowed to stabilize tonight before you solve next month.
You are allowed to choose one next move.
Money fear gets louder when you confuse urgency with truth.
Money fear gets louder when one bill turns into your whole identity.
One clear money move can break the pressure into pieces.
One clear money move can keep panic from running the room.
Relief around money can start with one smaller decision.
Your worth is not your savings account.
Your worth is not how much you owe.
You are allowed to stop doom-calculating.
Money fear gets louder when shame is driving the math.
One clear money move can turn shame into information.
One clear money move can return you to the part that can handle things.
Relief around money can start with one clear move.

top20_ranked.text: Rest is not falling behind.
Rest is not something you have to earn.
Being tired does not mean you are lazy.
You were not made to run on fumes and call it normal.
Your body has been asking for real sleep.
Softness can help you come back to yourself.
You were not made to stay available to everyone all the time.
You were not made to keep giving from an empty place.
Being tired does not mean you should push harder.
Your body has been asking for a gentler pace.
Your body has been asking for a chance to exhale.
Softness can give your nervous system a landing place.
Softness can protect what is left of your energy.
Rest is not laziness.
Rest is not the enemy of progress.
You were not made to earn love through overfunctioning.
Being tired does not mean you are failing.
Your body has been asking for stillness without guilt.
Softness can do more for you than another push.
Softness can remind you that you are not a machine.

top20_ranked.text: You were never meant to carry all of this alone.
Being seen can start with one honest sentence.
Silence is not proof that no one cares.
The right people will not punish your honesty.
You are still allowed to need warmth.
You are still allowed to believe support can still find you.
You were never meant to hold yourself together in silence forever.
Being seen can start with one request without apology.
Being seen can start with one person who feels safe.
Silence is not proof that your needs are unreasonable.
The right people will not make support feel like debt.
The right people will not ask you to earn warmth.
You are still allowed to want support without a crisis.
You were never meant to earn closeness by being low-maintenance.
Silence is not proof that you are hard to love.
The right people will not make you audition for care.
The right people will not love only the edited parts.
You are still allowed to ask to be understood.
You are still allowed to need a witness.
You are still allowed to want to feel chosen.

top20_ranked.text: Overthinking is not intuition.
The next step does not need to be loud to be real.
You already know more than panic wants you to believe.
Confusion gets louder when fear is driving.
One clear move can break a week-long spiral.
One clear move can make the fog less convincing.
The next step does not need to solve everything at once.
The next step does not need to arrive with certainty.
You already know more than your self-doubt is granting.
Confusion gets louder when you are trying to think from exhaustion.
Confusion gets louder when the loop feels safer than the step.
One clear move can give your mind a place to land.
One clear move can start momentum without demanding certainty.
Overthinking is not a plan.
The next step does not need to carry your entire future.
You already know more than the late-night version of you can trust.
Confusion gets louder when you confuse panic with guidance.
Confusion gets louder when shame is whispering under the analysis.
One clear move can turn thinking into traction.
One clear move can stop the loop from leading the whole day.
